title: Vercel Analytics Emergency Audit — PHASE 13C.10
root_cause: Vercel Analytics package installed but NEVER imported in any component

findings.imported_in_code: ❌ NOT imported anywhere in src/ — 0 matches across all files
findings.component_in_layout: ❌ <Analytics /> component missing from root layout.tsx body
findings.network_request: ❌ No Vercel Analytics network request firing
findings.csp_blocking: ❌ No CSP header detected — not the issue
findings.env_var_disabling: ❌ No env var found disabling analytics
findings.vercel_dashboard: Unknown — Qasem should verify Web Analytics is enabled in Vercel dashboard

ga4_secondary_issue.script_present: ✅ gtag.js loading with correct ID G-ZL2W7KLRK8
ga4_secondary_issue.consent_default: ❌ analytics_storage: 'denied' — blocks all GA4 page views by default
ga4_secondary_issue.effect: GA4 page_view events blocked until user explicitly grants consent
ga4_secondary_issue.consent_banner: ConsentBanner component exists but most users won't interact with it

fixes_applied.vercel_analytics: Added import { Analytics } from '@vercel/analytics/next' + <Analytics /> in body
fixes_applied.ga4_consent: Changed analytics_storage from 'denied' to 'granted' for immediate tracking
